Beginning at the northwest corner of the subject parcel; thence N 89°45'00" E, 100.00 feet; thence S 80°00'00" E, 120.00 feet; thence S 70°00'00" E, 100.00 feet; thence S 60°00'00" E, 90.00 feet; thence S 50°00'00" E, 110.00 feet; thence S 40°00'00" E, 130.00 feet; thence S 30°00'00" E, 100.00 feet; thence S 20°00'00" E, 90.00 feet; thence S 10°00'00" W, 110.00 feet; thence S 30°00'00" W, 130.00 feet; thence S 50°00'00" W, 100.00 feet; thence S 70°00'00" W, 90.00 feet; thence S 89°45'00" W, 110.00 feet; thence N 60°00'00" W, 130.00 feet; thence N 30°00'00" W, 200.00 feet; thence N 00°15'00" W, 300.00 feet to the point of beginning.
